## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

Why is this change needed?

## How

How was this implemented? Any design decisions worth noting?

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Manual testing done locally
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`dotnet test`)

## Checklist

- [ ] Code builds without warnings (`dotnet build --warnaserrors`)
- [ ] Code is formatted (`dotnet format --verify-no-changes`)
- [ ] No new vulnerable dependencies
